title: ononis pinnata var. schousboei
intro: Ononis pinnata var. schousboei is a plant species also known as Schousboe's restharrow, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin issues, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Ononis pinnata var. schousboei can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
